posts.author: arulselvan04 (Arul Selvan Bose)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

We have implemented monday.com in our company recently.

How can we allow members in a board to view, connect board columns and mirror columns without having to add them as a member on the connected boards.

Basically, it is a high-level board reporting the progress of different projects to the management. Few columns on the board are mirror columns connected to a few level boards. Adding members of management to all the low-level boards wouldn’t be an option, but without being subscribed to that board, they’re unable to view the mirror columns values.

We have added our clients on low-level boards as guests, so every project or client has a separate board.

What is the best way forward on this?

Adding screenshot of the board from member perspective.

image1182×914 50.4 KB

Below is what we need them to see.

image1814×826 97.8 KB

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @arulselvan04!

At this time, people need access to the connected boards in order to see any information in a board’s mirror columns. If you haven’t found a good alternative solution just yet, let us know at support@monday.com and we’d be happy to figure out a workaround together!

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
